turns.user_message: My friend said I seemed a bit off today and now I can't stop thinking about it. I keep wondering what they noticed that I didn't.
I'm analyzing every single thing I did around them, trying to find the mistake. I feel this tightness in my chest whenever I remember their comment.
That one comment has completely taken over my mind and I feel like I'm spiraling. I can't focus on anything else because I'm so convinced I messed up.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did.
